title: Pirate Guns
description: A mod with simple pirate guns that fits the Minecraft style
body: This mod is inspired by Sea of Thieves and has custom animations. This mod offers you the possibility of shooting to the mobs. You will be able to snipe with the Pirate Rifle, or if you want to be more aggressive you have the Trabuco, the Pirate Pistol and the last one, doing quick scopes with the Pirate Rifle. The guns it has are: **Pirate Pistol** **Pirate Rifle** **Trabuco** **Primitive Revolver** **More images** To craft the guns and ammo: To reload: First, you need to load the bullet, for that, if your gun is the pirate pistol or pirate rifle, then you will need for the pirate pistol(1 gunpowder, 1 musket bullet) and for the pirate rifle(1 gunpowder, 1 musket bullet), the last one is the trabuco, you need(2 gunpowder, 8 trabuco bullets), to trigger the reload animation just press the r key Press the V key to start a melee attack Press the LEFT ALT key to start a simple gun check animation If you want to equip a scope to the pirate rifle then you need to press the insert key with a spyglass in your inventory, if you want to remove it, just press the insert key again You can change most of the things in the SERVER config file, like how much gunpowder does the gun need to reload, the damage, the damage reduction by range, cancel some gun craftings, the melee damage, shoot cooldown, materias needed for crafting, crafting results, etc. Enjoy. [![A place where you can find a cool review about this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4b367614d86779d6d429b1b070a08efac2f9139_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/pirate-guns) Mod Version 1.20.1 is still young, so it may have some bugs. Please report if you find it My discord server: https://discord.gg/BPKmvKqCsZ
